Author: mole99
Content:
If OpenROAD crashes, you can generate a standalone reproducible via LibreLane and submit an issue upstream.

However, you should first check whether a more recent version of OpenROAD fixes the issue. To update OpenROAD, you can check out my WIP branch and see if this makes any difference: https://github.com/librelane/librelane/pull/915
